title: 667-tsuu no Love Letter
synonyms: リプトン ミルクティー CM
synopsis: The story starts with how Touma and Yui met, and as time went on, seemingly are pining over each other through love letters after they're forced to part ways. Near the end of the advertisement, however, it's revealed that every line of dialogue actually comes from letters written by the public after Morinaga first announced it was discontinuing Lipton Milk Tea back in March 2022. The advertisement is directed by Toshitaka Shinoda made for Morinaga Milk Industry, advertising the return of Lipton Milk Tea in carton form. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

tags.name: Advertisement

title: Red Fox
synopsis: Welcome to Ibana, a beautiful country also known as the red country. Here, lives the red fox, a wily beast who takes on the form of a human and feasts on the livers of humans. For hundreds of years, the fox kills without hesitation until, thanks to one human woman, it comes to know what that human emotion called "love", truly is. Out of the land of fire, erupts the cruel yet tragic love story of one evil spirit who yearns to possess the heart of one human woman. source: ANN note: The first episode was aired on youtube one day before the official Laftel release on 19.05.2025.

title: Chalk-iro no People
titleNative: チョーク色のピープル
synopsis: OVA adaptation of a manga by Watase Seizou. Five short episodes from Seizou Watase's romantic manga: "Building Without Tide," "Brother and Sister" "Sometimes I'm Happy" "I've Saved the Sidecar for You" "The Santa Quartet"

title: The Mirror: Twin Cities - Overture
titleRomaji: Jing: Shuang Cheng - Feng Qi Pian
synopsis: In order to escape the chaotic world, Na Sheng, an enthusiastic and cheerful Hmon girl, journeyed far and long seeking the home of her dreams, Yunhuang. But is Yunhuang really the fabled paradise of Taoyuan? With every step deeper into Yunhuang, scenes of strange and disturbing blood rain unfold; legendary figures with distinctive personalities compete on the stage, performing scenes of poignant and moving tales of myth.

title: Cheng Ye Xiao He
synopsis: Xiao He, a famous player in an online game, once defeated a female thief in the game. Surprisingly, the female thief is a former top-class e-sports player! What makes her end up like this? The two strangers always come across each other without knowing it. What will happen to them in the digital life? (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Ogaki Matsuri ni Ikou yo!
titleNative: 大垣まつりにいこうよ！
synopsis: A tourism promotion anime for Ogaki City in the Gifu Prefecture. The story's script was written by Kou Nakamura, a famous novelist from Ogaki City. A love story set during the Ogaki Festival preparations. The festival itself is held in May.

title: Kaede New Town
synopsis: Mikio Osawa, an average 5th grade school boy, lives in the suburbs of Osaka. Mikio likes Haruko Tezuka, a cute little girl in his class. However, Mikio is too shy and withdrawn to tell Haruko that he likes her. One day, Mikio's close friend Megane brings news that Haruko is about to move away to another town... Kaede Newtown is a romantic comedy animation created by Naoto Iwakiri, an Osaka-born illustrator. With cute little characters and music created by Japanese band Aprils and singer-songwriter TOMOVSKY, Kaede Newtown takes you back to the good ol' town you lived in during the good ol' days of your childhood. (Source: crunchyroll.com)

title: Nano List
synopsis: Milo lives in a world where interacting with androids is completely normal. And now, he lives with TWO androids built by his sister. How safe is he living with androids who have deadly strength? Why did his sister gift him a "bodyguard android?" Well, he's about to find out the hard way. (Source: WEBTOONS)

title: Observing Elena Evoy
synonyms: My Observational Diary of Elena Evoy
伊莲娜·埃沃的观察日志 #웹소설
synopsis: "If you're not my rival, why do I feel this way?" Blessed with both beauty and brains, it was only natural for Johann to be the top student at the Academy - that is until Elena Evoy appears. To make things worse, she seems completely unfazed by his charms, shattering his self-esteem. So why can't he stop thinking about her? (Source: Manta)

title: Ohayou! Spank (Movie)

synopsis: Based on the shoujo manga by Yukimuro Shunichi and Takanashi Shizue serialised in Nakayoshi.

title: Oni no Hanayome wa Taberaretai
titleNative: 鬼の花嫁は喰べられたい
synopsis: The story centers on a human girl named Mashiro, who was saved by the demon chieftain, Shuten Douji. To become his food, she marries him at the age of 17 when she is ready to be eaten. But on the other hand, Shuten Douji loves her deeply and has no intention of using her as food. They misunderstand each other because they love each other too much.

title: Tenka Touitsu Koi no Ran ~ Shutsujin! Saika 4-nin Shuu
titleRomaji: Tenka Touitsu Koi no Ran ~ Shutsujin! Saika 4-nin Shuu
titleNative: 天下統一恋の乱　出陣！雑賀4人衆
synopsis: 15th Century Japan is ravaged by constant wars, as the lords of the realm seek to rule the land. Having lost your father in battle, you are working in the restaurant he left your mother and little brother...when an evil magistrate sends your little brother away...to become a poison taster! To save his life, you disguise yourself as a boy and go to the castle in his place...but what awaits you there is so much more! “I'll show you all...my divine rule!” In the Sengoku era...love is the most dangerous battle of all! (Source: Official Website)

title: Pan to Boku no Momo-chan
titleNative: パンと僕のモモちゃん
synopsis: The story follows a boy named Shiro and his aunt, Momo, who live together after the death of Shiro's mother, Momo's older sister. Shiro makes bread for Momo in the mornings. (Source: AnimeNewsNetwork)

title: The Starry Night
synopsis: The Starry Night tells about the love that becomes clearer as time goes by, through the process of organizing his own life, loving an old lover. (Source: vcrworks.kr)
